title: GOOD FOR YOU, GOOD FOR THE FARM / BULGARIA
subtitle: GET INSPIRED! A ROADMAP TO REPLICATE KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE ABOUT FAIR FOOD SUPPLY CHAINS
description: A roadmap to replicate a fair food supply chain initiative that supports small farmers by establishing physical and online marketplaces, enhancing transparency and fair pricing. It presents the Good for you, Good for the Farm campaign in Bulgaria, detailing its problem statement, innovative solution, actors involved, funding model, benefits, and key success factors.
